narrative:
Precinct Cambridge 1-A (precinct in Guernsey County) has 770 registered voters, with 62.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
